2606.10287.title: When Metrics Disagree: A Meta-Analysis of Knowledge-Graph-Completion Model Benchmarking
2606.10287.paper_summary: Evaluating Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC) models remains challenging because standard assessment relies on isolated rank-based metrics such as MRR, Hits$@$k, and Mean Rank, which often produce conflicting model orderings across datasets. A model that leads on MRR may trail on Hits@1, and strong performance on one dataset may not generalize to another. This fragmentation hinders comparison, enables selective reporting, and obscures real progress. We reframe KGC evaluation as a Multi-Criteria Decision-Making (MCDM) problem and present a meta-analysis of seven aggregators across five tests: consistency, cross-dataset stability, metric independence, robustness under noise, and generalizability. Each test is averaged over leave-one-model-out (LOMO) and leave-one-group-out (LOGO) removals so that reliability reflects aggregator behavior across diverse model subsets. Across tail $(h,r,?)$ and relation $(h,?,t)$ prediction, Pareto-optimal analysis identifies Z-score as the most balanced aggregator, which ranks DualE highest for tail prediction and FMS (Flow-Modulated Scoring) highest for relation prediction. A test-sensitivity analysis using the same removals shows that consistency and stability are largely removal-invariant, while generalizability and independence are the most sensitive. The framework resolves evaluation inconsistencies and offers evidence-based guidance for aggregator selection and model benchmarking in KGC.
2606.10287.paper_summary_zh: 評估知識圖譜補全（KGC）模型仍然具有挑戰性，因為標準評估依賴於孤立的基於排名的指標，如MRR、Hits$@$k和平均排名，這些指標在不同數據集之間經常產生相互矛盾的模型排序。一個在MRR上表現良好的模型可能在Hits@1上表現不佳，而在一個數據集上的強勁表現可能無法推廣到另一個數據集。這種碎片化妨礙了比較，促進了選擇性報告，並掩蓋了實際進展。我們將KGC評估重新構建為多準則決策問題（MCDM），並呈現對五個測試中七個聚合器的元分析：一致性、跨數據集穩定性、指標獨立性、噪聲下的穩健性和可推廣性。每個測試都在留一模型（LOMO）和留一組（LOGO）移除的基礎上進行平均，以便可靠性反映聚合器在不同模型子集中的行為。在尾部 $(h,r,?)$ 和關係 $(h,?,t)$ 預測中，Pareto最優分析確定Z-score為最平衡的聚合器，該聚合器在尾部預測中將DualE排在最高，而在關係預測中將FMS（流調制計分）排在最高。使用相同的移除進行的測試敏感性分析顯示，一致性和穩定性在很大程度上是不變的，而可推廣性和獨立性則是最敏感的。該框架解決了評估不一致性，並為KGC中的聚合器選擇和模型基準測試提供了基於證據的指導。
2606.10287.author: Haji Gul et.al.
